title: Srimad Bhagavatam | HG Madhu Pandit Dasa | SB 3.22.15-16 | 04-10-2016
speaker: HG Madhu Pandit Dasa

segments.text: There were many considerations by Kardamamuni before accepting the daughter of Swayambhuva Manu.
Most important is that Devahuti had first of all fixed her mind on marrying him.
choose to have any other man as her husband.
That is a great consideration because female psychology dictates
that when a woman offers her heart to a man for the first time,
it is very difficult for her to take it back.
Also, she had not married before.
All these considerations convinced Kardamamuni to accept her.
Yes, I shall accept your daughter under religious regulations of marriage.
There are different kinds of marriages of which the first class marriage is held
by inviting a suitable bridegroom for the daughter and giving her in charity,
well-dressed and well-decorated with ornaments along with the dowry
according to the means of the father.
There are other kinds of marriage such as Gandharva marriage and marriage by love
which are also accepted as marriage.
Even if one is forcibly kidnapped and later on accepted as a wife, that is also accepted.
But Kardamamuni accepted the first-class way of marriage because the father was willing
She had never offered her heart to anyone else.
All these considerations made Kardamamuni agree to accept the daughter of Swaibuwa Manu.

But they are combining in an adharmic way. They are configuring themselves in an adharmic way. That adharmic way is called sin. Sinful way.
So devotees want to be free from sinful way, sinful thinking, sinful feeling, sinful activities. They want to be free by engaging fully in Krishna's service.
